creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
have not seen any comments back on this, but if folks having issues I was not too clear on the patch. save it as a file called something like
patch-isl-20-or-newer

and place it in
/usr/ports/lang/gcc6-aux/files

and the build will complete fine if you have isl installed on your system, which if you have alternate compilers from ports you likely do. in my case avr-gcc requires it.
